Trick or Treat? Scare others with your scarecrow scarf armor! This rusty armor is from a Jack'o Sorcerer that already had many different pumpkins faces, do you want to see more options? A cursed pumpkin forever wandering in the halloween lands, looking for the great mages and warriors that made this with him, seeking the vengeance of a berserker. Come check more items of this set at our group!

items.name: Scrapper’s Satchel
items.description: A trusty satchel for the resourceful and the resilient. Worn-out but reliable, it holds all the essentials for a true scavenger—tools, patches, and a bit of luck. Whether you're fixing broken machines or piecing together your next great escape, this satchel has your back.
